name: Cure-All Chicken Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 large Yellow Onion, peeled and sliced
2 medium Carrots, peeled and cut up
2 Ribs Celery with Leaves, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil in a large soup pot.
2. Add the whole chicken, turkey wing, garlic, onion, carrot, parsnip, celery, and bay leaf.
3. Simmer for about 3 hours, skimming fat from the top as needed.
4. Taste and adjust seasonings with salt and pepper about 2 hours into cooking.
5. Remove the bay leaf and discard it.
6. Transfer vegetables to a food processor fitted with a steel blade; puree and reserve.
7. Remove the chicken, discarding the skin, bones, and turkey wing.
8. Return the chicken meat to the soup.
9. Raise to a simmer. Add noodles and cook until al dente.
10. Add vegetable puree back to the soup and stir to mix thoroughly.
11. Adjust seasonings with salt and pepper.
12. Serve warm.
